params.initialPrice: Initial price in USDC's smallest unit per whole                        RWA token (e.g. `120 * 1e6` for 120 USDC/share).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setPrice(uint256).details: Owner-only. Used between demo runs to reflect a "new" market price.

swap(uint256,uint256,address).details: Caller must `approve(this, usdcIn)` on USDC first. Follows      checks-effects-interactions: pulls USDC, then sends RWA last.

params.minRwaOut: Revert if the resulting RWA output is less than this.
params.recipient: Address that receives the RWA tokens.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

withdraw(address,uint256,address).details: Owner-only. Intentionally unrestricted on which token can be      withdrawn; this is a demo, not a treasury.

RWA_TOKEN().notice: The mocked RWA token paid out. 18 decimals.

USDC().notice: USDC accepted for swaps. Expected to be Circle's Base Sepolia         USDC at 0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e (6 decimals).

pricePerShare().notice: Price quoted in USDC's smallest unit (6 decimals) for one whole         RWA token (1e18). e.g. `120 * 1e6` = 120 USDC per share.

quote(uint256).notice: View helper: how much RWA you would receive for `usdcIn` USDC         right now. Cheap to call from a frontend before quoting the user.

swap(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Swap `usdcIn` USDC for RWA tokens at the current `pricePerShare`.

withdraw(address,uint256,address).notice: Pull any ERC20 out of the contract — used to refund collected         USDC or to drain RWA liquidity between demos.
